question: Show the client names and their total amounts of books ordered.
sql: SELECT Client.Name, SUM(Books_Order.amount) AS TotalAmount FROM Client JOIN Orders ON Client.IdClient = Orders.IdClient JOIN Books_Order ON Orders.IdOrder = Books_Order.IdOrder GROUP BY Client.IdClient;

back_translation.intent: 计算每个客户的订单总金额

semantic.reason: 目标表不一致，原始问题未明确涉及Books_Order表，而SQL描述中包含该表。此外，'total amounts of books ordered'可能指订单数量而非金额，但SQL中使用SUM(Books_Order.amount)进行金额聚合。
